allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add ASL fingerspelling detection with spelling buffer and tutorial page

Replace custom gestures with 19 ASL letter signs \(B-Z, excluding A/E/J/M/N/S/T\).
Letters accumulate into words via a spelling buffer; fist clears it.
Add a separate tutorial page describing each hand sign.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
